props.name: mode
props.description: Display mode of the fluid glass effect. Options: 'lens', 'bar', 'cube'

props.name: lensProps
props.description: Props specific to lens mode including material properties like ior, thickness, transmission

props.name: barProps
props.description: Props specific to bar mode including navItems array and material properties

props.name: cubeProps
props.description: Props specific to cube mode including material properties and interaction settings
